title: СМАК buns
description: The resource pack replaces some food with CMAK buns that are themed to the replaced items.
body:
![CMAK intro](https://i.imgur.com/OKN6LjN.png)
# 
**RU:** Данный Ресурс Пак _заменяет_ некоторую еду на **булочки** от всеми любимого **СМАК'а**

**ENG:** This Resource Pack _replaces_ some food with **buns** from everyone's favorite **SMAK**
#
![https://i.imgur.com/MApMwPC.png](https://i.imgur.com/MApMwPC.png)

*CMAK's Menu _(replaced items)_:
1. _Baked_ Potato → **bun with baked potato filling**
2. _bread_ → **cherry jam filled bun**
3. _Sweet Berries_ → **cherry jam filled briosh**
4. _Cake_ → **cinnamon bun frosting**
5. _Cookie_ → **chocolate truffle filled bun**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

qq nerkin

</details>
